stack.backend: Ghost CMS (v5, Alpine, SQLite3 via Docker)

modules.module: Docker Compose setup isolating Ghost from open web via cloudflared.
Private admin frontend interfacing with Ghost Admin API.

decisions.decision: Decided to use Astro with Node SSR adapter for secure API key injection and server-side submission rendering, avoiding client-side exposure of Ghost keys.
Chose internal docker networking for Ghost, mapped solely via cloudflared to mitigate multi-user CVEs.
Rejected iframe injection of Koenig to build a custom Writing Room editor bound to the Admin API to preserve frontend visual fidelity.
Using Ghost Admin API `members` endpoint to persist scratchpad input to the owner's `note` metadata field, avoiding draft post clutter per spec.
Testing phase 1 locally using Docker on Windows mapping to localhost:2368 before pushing to DigitalOcean.
Used Astro .env locally to securely wire the Ghost Admin API key provided by the user, ensuring the front-end connects immediately while keeping the key server-side.

completed.task: Defined infrastructure and local docker-compose configuration for Ghost.
Scaffolded observatory_app in Astro and replicated HTML mockup layout/styling.
Constructed custom Writing Room UI with forms routing backend via SSR.
Wired Ghost Admin API utility and /api/scratchpad persistence endpoint.
Spun up and verified local Ghost development environment via Docker, configured API key, and successfully launched front-end.
Gate condition met: User manually published the 3 requisite gate-posts locally in the Ghost admin.

in_progress.task: Phase 2: Plausible and YouTube placeholder setups.

next_up.task: Awaiting real Plausible/YouTube API keys to inject into `.env` to execute live fetches.
Phase 3: Resonance Index calculations and Heatmap shading hooks.

blocked_on.dependency: User supplying real `PLAUSIBLE_API_KEY`, `PLAUSIBLE_SITE_ID`, and `YOUTUBE_API_KEY` for `.env` injection.

open_interfaces.interface: API wrapper. Wired via .env locally. Requires real Ghost Admin API keys post-deployment.
